name: thread-mcp
description: Thread MCP server — exposes Gmail inbox, approval queue, calendar, AI features (daily brief, smart replies, meeting prep), and agent tools for AI assistants via the Model Context Protocol. Backed by the Corsair SDK for Gmail and Google Calendar.

auth.note: Option A: jwt + jwt_refresh cookies from Thread sign-in. Option B: Authorization: Bearer <THREAD_MCP_API_KEY> — must match THREAD_MCP_USER_ID env (scoped; no arbitrary X-Thread-User-Id).

tools.name: list_inbox
tools.description: List recent Gmail inbox threads via Corsair Gmail API. Returns thread metadata.

tools.name: search_inbox
tools.description: Full-text search over Gmail inbox using Corsair Gmail API. Supports Gmail query syntax (from:, subject:, has:attachment, etc.).

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Retrieve a full Gmail thread including all messages and sender info via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: rank_inbox
tools.description: AI-powered urgency ranking of inbox threads. Fetches threads via Corsair Gmail and scores them using OpenAI.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all Gmail labels (system and user-defined) via Corsair. Call before apply_label or remove_label to get label IDs.

tools.name: archive_thread
tools.description: Archive a Gmail thread via Corsair (removes INBOX label). Requires explicit user intent.

tools.name: star_thread
tools.description: Star a Gmail thread via Corsair Gmail API (adds STARRED label). Use to bookmark important emails.

tools.name: unstar_thread
tools.description: Remove the star from a Gmail thread via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: mark_important
tools.description: Mark a Gmail thread as important via Corsair Gmail API (adds IMPORTANT label).

tools.name: apply_label
tools.description: Apply a Gmail label to a thread by label ID via Corsair. Call list_labels first to get valid IDs.

tools.name: remove_label
tools.description: Remove a Gmail label from a thread by label ID via Corsair.

tools.name: trash_thread
tools.description: Move a Gmail thread to trash via Corsair Gmail API. Use only when user explicitly wants to delete an email.

tools.name: delete_draft
tools.description: Permanently delete a Gmail draft by ID via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: queue_email
tools.description: Queue an email for human approval (send cap: 3/conversation). Uses Corsair Gmail API to send after approval. mode=send queues for approval; mode=draft saves only.

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List Google Calendar events in a date range via Corsair Calendar API. Use to find free slots or meeting context.

tools.name: queue_calendar_invite
tools.description: Queue a Google Calendar invite for human approval. Supports recurrence (RRULE), attendees, location. Uses Corsair Calendar API after approval.

tools.name: list_queue
tools.description: List pending (or all) approval queue items — emails and calendar invites awaiting user confirmation.

tools.name: approve_queue_item
tools.description: Approve a pending queue item — sends the email via Corsair Gmail or creates the calendar event via Corsair Calendar.

tools.name: dismiss_queue_item
tools.description: Dismiss (reject) a pending queue item without executing it.

tools.name: get_gmail_connection_status
tools.description: Check whether Gmail and Google Calendar are connected via Corsair for the current user.

tools.name: get_daily_brief
tools.description: Generate an AI-powered daily brief: today's priorities, pending replies, meeting insights, risks, and recommended actions. Pulls live data from Corsair Gmail + Corsair Calendar and synthesizes via OpenAI.

tools.name: get_smart_replies
tools.description: Generate 3 AI-powered smart reply suggestions for a Gmail thread. Reads full thread context via Corsair Gmail API and generates replies using OpenAI.

tools.name: get_meeting_prep
tools.description: Generate AI meeting preparation for a calendar event: past email context, agenda items, talking points, and risks. Fetches event via Corsair Calendar and related emails via Corsair Gmail.

tools.name: get_thread_context
tools.description: Generate a smart context summary for an email thread: related emails, key people, action items, and sentiment. Fetches thread via Corsair Gmail and related context via OpenAI.

tools.name: get_missed_followups
tools.description: Detect meetings from the past week that had no follow-up email sent. Cross-references Corsair Calendar events with Corsair Gmail sent messages.

tools.name: check_free_busy
tools.description: Check free/busy slots for a time range via Corsair Calendar freebusy API. Returns busy slots and available windows.

tools.name: respond_to_event
tools.description: Accept, decline, or tentatively accept a Google Calendar event invitation via Corsair.

tools.name: reschedule_event
tools.description: Reschedule a Google Calendar event to a new time via Corsair Calendar.

tools.name: cancel_event
tools.description: Cancel a Google Calendar event via Corsair.

tools.name: list_drafts
tools.description: List Gmail draft emails via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: get_draft
tools.description: Fetch a specific Gmail draft including full content via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: mark_thread_read
tools.description: Mark a Gmail thread as read via Corsair Gmail API (removes UNREAD label).

tools.name: get_contact_intel
tools.description: Relationship intelligence for a contact: interaction history, response rate, key topics via Corsair Gmail + OpenAI.

tools.name: summarize_thread
tools.description: AI summary of an email thread: key decisions, action items, next steps via Corsair Gmail + OpenAI.

examples.description: Get AI daily brief (pulls from Corsair Gmail + Calendar)
Get smart reply suggestions for a thread
Queue an email for human approval

arguments.subject: Follow up on our meeting
arguments.body: Hi — following up on the discussion from yesterday. Could you confirm next steps?
